headline:
Sharp Cuts.
No Compromises.
subheadline: Precision fades and classic cuts for the man who knows what he wants.
about: Iron Edge has been the go-to barbershop on King Street for over a decade. We don't do rushed cuts or cookie-cutter styles — every client gets the chair time they deserve. Walk in with a look in mind. Walk out sharper than you came.

services.name: Signature Fade
services.description: Tapered to perfection with a straight razor finish.

services.name: Classic Cut
services.description: Scissor work and precision shears, no guards.

services.name: Hot Towel Shave
services.description: Old-school straight razor shave with pre-shave oil and hot towel.

services.name: Beard Lineup
services.description: Crisp edges, sculpted beard lines, zero strays.

services.name: Kids Cut
services.description: Patient, experienced barbers for boys 12 and under.

metaDescription: Precision fades and classic cuts in Toronto. Iron Edge Barbershop — King St W.
